title: Player coordinates missing from LLM chat context
description:
When a player talks to the bot, the LLM prompt should include the player's coordinates. From chat: "[DEBUG] the agent should have my coordinates when I talk to it"

The agent response: "You're right, I can see your coordinates through the entity list."

Entity observation data (TSK-0242) provides nearby entity positions, but player position might not be reliably included in the chat context. The ChatReceivedEvent includes PlayerPos but this might not flow into the LLM system prompt correctly.
